text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Great, it's snowing... Damn, it's<n>freezing.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Of course it's cold! The holidays are<n>just around
the corner!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So, like, what're you getting for your<n>trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean "what're you<n>getting"?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Don't tell me you're notgetting anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... I'm just not that into winter<n>holidays.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's perfectly valid, but look at it<n>like this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Without opportunities like this, you<n>wouldn't know
when to express your<n>gratitude, would you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Oof.

It's finally the holiday season, but<n>since Narita
Taishin isn't into it, I<n>figured there'd be no chance
she'd<n>be interested in celebrating. That's<n>why...
choice_data_list: (I can't believe she invited me out!)
(I can't believe she invited me out!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays or whatever. Here.

I'm about to explode with joy when<n>she hands
me a present, but I contain<n>myself and slowly
open my gift.
Inside are BNW plush Cuties.
choice_data_list:
(Taishin's plushie is the only large-sized
version...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won them at an arcade, but I'm not<n>into putting
things like that in my<n>room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So I figured I'd give them to you.<n>That's all.
choice_data_list: (Taishin's plushie is the only one that's big!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Why are you grinning like<n>that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I swear I'll roundhouse kick youinto another dimension!

I carefully tuck the plushies back into<n>the box as
she scolds me, which is<n>when I notice something.

There's a bottle that smells really<n>good in there as
well.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious? It's leave-in<n>conditioner!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have much time to choose a<n>present, so I
didn't know what to get.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I talked with someone at the store,<n>and apparently
this is a really popular<n>gift.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've seen my classmates giving it to<n>each other
as birthday gifts, and it's<n>not like it matters if you
already have<n>some.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you can't ever have too<n>much conditioner
for your tail, so—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Give that back right this INSTANT, and<n>forget this
ever happened!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? But you don't even have atail to condition!
choice_data_list: I'll keep it as a decoration.
I'll keep it as a decoration.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're so dumb.

We walk around town after that,<n>when suddenly
Taishin stops dead at<n>the sight of a digital
billboard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
If there's one player who's gotten a<n>lot of
attention this year, it's this<n>unmatched three-point
shooter!

A face flashes up on the screen. It's<n>a redheaded
basketball player smiling<n>shyly.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's one way to put it...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the Umamusume I'm rooting for<n>just got first
place in the autumn<n>Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
She reminded me that I need to keep<n>pushing hard
too!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: She's so amazing! You're my hero,<n>Narita Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well... Anyway...

Narita Taishin looks away,<n>embarrassed, but after
several<n>moments of awkward silence, she
speaks up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to be a role model for<n>anyone. I'm
not trying to inspire<n>people.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I run just for myself. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Being looked up to isn't the worst<n>feeling in the
world, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
People make fun of me, they get<n>clingy, they hold
on tight even when I<n>don't want it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And at the end of the day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, it's not so bad.

Narita Taishin gazes at the girl<n>warmly, as if
reciprocating her smile.
